setup.heading: Spotify setup
setup.description: To log in with Spotify, you must set up a personal Spotify Developer app. An active Spotify Premium subscription is required.
setup.step1: Visit developer.spotify.com and log in with your Spotify account
setup.step2: Click on your name in the top right corner of the website and select "Dashboard" from the menu
setup.step3: Review the Spotify Developer Terms, and once you reach the dashboard click "Create app"
setup.step4: Enter any name and description for your app, then paste the following into the "Redirect URIs" field and click "Add":
setup.step5: Click "Save" at the bottom of the page. Your newly created app will have a Client ID listed under "Basic Information". Copy this value and paste it into the field below:
setup.notice: Aria is not affiliated with Spotify. Your use of Spotify's services is subject to their terms and policies.

errorDialog.premiumRequiredMessage: Your Spotify account does not have an active Spotify Premium subscription. Spotify Premium is required for playback of tracks from Spotify within the app.
errorDialog.profileErrorMessage: The profile information for this Spotify account couldn't be obtained. You may need to ensure that your Spotify account has access to the application.

librarySetup.heading: Configure your Spotify library
librarySetup.description: Choose which songs from Spotify you'd like to include in your library. You can change this later in Settings.
